title: Order-13 N-gram Oracle + Score-First TTT (0.0308 BPB)
author: THUQiXuan

data.description: GPU-vectorized logistic context mixer combining neural logits with order-2 through order-13 n-gram backoff probabilities.

novel_contributions: Pre-filling order-2 through order-13 n-gram tables from the full training set before the training loop
Score-first test-time training where each validation chunk is fully scored before any weight updates
A pretrained n-gram oracle passed into evaluation to eliminate cold-start behavior
GPU-vectorized backoff n-gram mixer combining neural and n-gram predictions
